step_rationale: NAP-2 is CXCL7 released from platelet α-granules; potent neutrophil and platelet activator.
mechanism: Neutrophil Activating Protein-2 is a platelet-derived chemokine promoting platelet activation and leukocyte recruitment.

references.title: Chronic dysfunction of the endothelium is associated with mortality in acute coronary syndrome patients.
